form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 4th of 10 at this track Mdn on March 12 over 1200m, 3 len behind Shilling Lane carrying 58kg at $61. Second-up 6th of 13 at Pinjarra Mdn on March 22 over 1300m, 4.5 len behind King Brew carrying 58kg at $19. Likely to find this out of reach.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation sixth of 10 at Albany Mdn December 26 over 1240m, 4 len behind Chiminy Blue with 56kg at $3.90. First up last campaign third of 12 at Albany Mdn December 4 over 1232m, 1.1 len behind El Foxie carrying 58kg at $6.50. Might be better off following this run.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 3rd of 9 at Ascot 3yo Mdn on March 11 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Roaming America with 54kg at $11. Second run from a spell sat on speed throughout when 2nd of 11 at Ascot 3yo Mdn on April 3 over 1200m, nose behind Le Fem Le Choix with 57kg at $3.60. Fitter now and making headway. The Maiden win is close.

form.formComment: At the latest run ran last of 11 at Ascot 3yo Mdn on April 3 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Le Fem Le Choix carrying 54kg at $201. The run before that 5th of 11 at Belmont Park Mdn on March 25 over 1000m, 5 len behind Joyoh carrying 54kg at $201. Doesn't make any appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over-raced during the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start 7th of 12 at Bunbury 2yo Mdn on June 11 over 1000m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Sound Of Speed with 57kg at $4.20. Went for a spell before returning 5th of 7 at Ascot 3yo 0Mwly on April 3 over 1000m, 4 len behind Kings Court carrying 57kg at $15. Fitter and is expected to do much better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lay inwards and unable to be fully tested over the final 100m.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Not seen since he finished last of 10 at Northam Mdn October 16 over 1100m, 8 len behind Salty Miss with 56kg at $71. On debut seventh of 9 at Bunbury Mdn September 29 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Excess Baggage carrying 55.5kg at $12. Might be better off following this run.

form.formComment: Four-year-old mare making debut by Gingerbread Man out of Pattie Me Lass. Fifth over 1000m in a Belmont Park trial on March 16. After that seventh over 1000m in a Belmont Park trial on March 30. Fitter for recent trials so it will pay to keep her safe.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Four-year-old mare making debut by Gingerbread Man out of Pattie Me Lass. Fifth over 1000m in a Belmont Park trial on March 16. After that seventh over 1000m in a Belmont Park trial on March 30. Fitter for recent trials so it will pay to keep her safe.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 48-day let-up. At the latest run rolled along in front then was edged out late 3rd of 9 at Bunbury Mdn on February 26 over 1100m, 0.9 len behind Cassenite carrying 55kg at $2.70. The run before that set the pace for much of the race 3rd of 14 at Bunbury Mdn on February 12 over 1200m, 2 len behind Desert Waves with 55kg at $4.20. Impressed last start. Doesn't need to improve much to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lay outwards on straightening. Rider reported the filly raced greenly.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 3rd of 16 at Pinjarra Mdn on March 22 over 1300m, 2 len behind Wheely with 55kg at $7.50. Before that 2nd of 11 at this track Mdn on March 5 over 1200m, 0.6 len behind Rosentrea with 55kg at $31. Close to a win. Solid top-three chance with a repeat of that latest performance.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 9 at Ascot 3yo Mdn on March 11 over 1000m, 2 len behind Roaming America carrying 55kg at $3.50.
